message.content:
Autotune finished with 0.6042 accuracy - still below 0.62 target. Let me try trigrams (wordNgrams=3) with small dim to keep training fast.

{"analysis":"Autotune got 0.6042 accuracy. Still below 0.62 target. Need to try wordNgrams=3 with smaller dim=50 and bucket=500K to keep training fast while capturing trigram patterns that often boost sentiment classification accuracy.","plan":"Run manual training with wordNgrams=3, dim=50, bucket=500000, epoch=50. This should train in ~10 minutes and may push accuracy past 0.62.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cat > /app/trigram.py << 'PYEOF'
import fasttext
import os

print('Training trigram model dim=50 ep=50...', flush=True)
m = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/app/train_full.txt', lr=0.5, epoch=50, wordNgrams=3,
    dim=50, loss='softmax', bucket=500000, minCount=1, thread=4, verbose=2
)
n, p, r = m.test('/app/test.txt')
print(f'\nAcc: {p:.4f}', flush=True)

m.save_model('/app/model_best.bin')
sz = os.path.getsize('/app/model_best.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Size: {sz:.1f} MB', flush=True)

if sz > 150:
    print('Quantizing...', flush=True)
    m.quantize(input='/app/train_full.txt', retrain=True, epoch=10, lr=0.25, thread=4, dsub=2, qnorm=True)
    m.save_model('/app/model.bin')
    sz2 = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
    n, p, r = m.test('/app/test.txt')
    print(f'Quant: sz={sz2:.1f}MB acc={p:.4f}', flush=True)
else:
    os.rename('/app/model_best.bin', '/app/model.bin')
    print(f'Saved /app/model.bin ({sz:.1f} MB)', flush=True)

print('DONE', flush=True)
PYEOF
